mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, code, description_cn, description_en, nodes, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_approval_flow_t WHERE status = 1
AND (name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_approval_flow_t WHERE code = #{code} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_approval_flow_t WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId} AND status = 1
